description: As a high-impact Content Writer, I spearheaded the digital fundraising efforts by crafting over 90 compelling campaigns that successfully secured more than Rp2.6 billion in donations. I effectively managed the brand's public narrative by authoring 15+ press releases and 30+ comprehensive blog articles on diverse topics including health and community empowerment. Additionally, I drove audience engagement through the creation of 80+ dynamic social media assets for Instagram and TikTok, ranging from educational carousels to broadly reach reels.

In this role, I served as a core contributor to the platform’s content ecosystem, producing 40+ productivity-focused blog articles and 10+ Twitter threads. I was responsible for the strategic development of monthly content calendars across Instagram, Twitter, and the company blog to ensure consistent brand messaging. Furthermore, I expanded the brand's reach by contributing as a featured writer for the monthly digital publication, DoZine.

I played a dual role in creative production and market research, notably crafting over 5 engaging broadcast scripts for the FlyOver program that balanced advertiser needs with listener entertainment. My analytical contributions included conducting a comprehensive telesurvey where I gathered data from 70+ respondents to identify radio listener trends and product preferences. I also ensured seamless daily operations by writing news and traffic reports and preparing interview for guest segments.

Serving as a dedicated Research Assistant, I managed the full lifecycle of data collection and analysis for the LIPI bio-toilet project at Babakan Sinyar Public Elementary School. I developed structured research plans tailored to specific subject profiles and executed data analysis to evaluate project efficacy. My work culminated in professional presentations where I delivered key findings and data insights directly to LIPI’s senior researchers.
